name: openhands-tab
description: A VS Code extension to interact with OpenHands agents in a dedicated sidebar chat view

openhands.devBridge.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable webview→extension debug logging bridge (Output channel + file in extension log path).

openhands.serverUrl.markdownDescription: OpenHands agent-server base URL. Leave blank to run in local mode.

openhands.servers.markdownDescription: List of saved OpenHands server URLs with optional labels.

openhands.secrets.sessionApiKey.markdownDescription:
**To set your Session API Key securely:**

[🔑 Configure Session API Key](command:openhands.setSessionApiKey)

_(Stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json. Used to authenticate to agent-server.)_

openhands.conversation.maxIterations.markdownDescription: Default max iterations for new conversations (server default is 500).

openhands.conversation.storeRoot.markdownDescription: Optional directory for local-mode conversation history/events. Leave empty to use `~/.openhands/conversations-vscode/`.

openhands.terminal.renderProgress.markdownDescription: Coalesce carriage-return (\r) progress updates in the OpenHands terminal log (keeps only the last update per line).

openhands.confirmation.policy.markdownDescription: Action confirmation policy: never ask, always ask, or ask for risky actions.

openhands.confirmation.risky.threshold.markdownDescription: Risk threshold for ConfirmRisky policy. Actions at or above this require confirmation.

openhands.confirmation.risky.confirmUnkn.markdownDescription: Whether actions with UNKNOWN risk require confirmation in risky mode.

openhands.llm.model.markdownDescription: Default model name for LLM requests.

openhands.llm.provider.markdownDescription: LLM provider selection. Use `auto` to infer from `openhands.llm.baseUrl` when set; otherwise local mode defaults to Anthropic.

openhands.llm.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Optional LLM base URL override. Leave empty to use provider default.

openhands.llm.apiVersion.markdownDescription: Optional LLM API version (e.g., Azure). Leave empty if not applicable.

openhands.llm.apiKey.markdownDescription:
**To set your LLM API Key securely:**

[🔑 Configure API Key](command:openhands.setApiKey)

_(API keys are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json)_

openhands.llm.timeout.markdownDescription: HTTP timeout in seconds. Leave empty to use default.

openhands.llm.topK.markdownDescription: Top-k sampling. Leave empty to use default.

openhands.llm.maxInputTokens.markdownDescription: Max input tokens. Leave empty to use default.

openhands.llm.maxOutputTokens.markdownDescription: Max output tokens. Leave empty to use default.

openhands.llm.inputCostPerToken.markdownDescription: Optional cost per input token (USD) for usage stats.

openhands.llm.outputCostPerToken.markdownDescription: Optional cost per output token (USD) for usage stats.

openhands.llm.usageId.markdownDescription: Optional usage_id for local-mode LLM metrics tracking. In remote mode, only applies if explicitly set.

openhands.elevenlabs.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable the HAL high-risk confirmation flow.

openhands.elevenlabs.mode.markdownDescription: HAL mode when enabled: `bundled` (E2E/CI), `tts_only` (TTS + buttons), `voice_confirm` (TTS + mic + Gemini).

openhands.elevenlabs.userName.markdownDescription: User name used only in templated HAL script lines.

openhands.elevenlabs.voiceAId.markdownDescription: ElevenLabs voice ID for HAL (voice A).

openhands.elevenlabs.voiceUserId.markdownDescription: ElevenLabs voice ID for the user (voice B, used in `tts_only` mode).

openhands.elevenlabs.cache.markdownDescription: Enable caching for generated ElevenLabs audio.

openhands.secrets.githubToken.markdownDescription:
**To set your GitHub token securely:**

[🔑 Configure GitHub Token](command:openhands.setGithubToken)

_(Tokens are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json)_

openhands.secrets.elevenLabsApiKey.markdownDescription:
**To set your ElevenLabs API key securely:**

[🔑 Configure ElevenLabs API Key](command:openhands.setElevenLabsApiKey)

_(Keys are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json)_

openhands.secrets.customSecret1.markdownDescription:
**To set your custom secret 1 securely:**

[🔑 Configure Custom Secret 1](command:openhands.setCustomSecret1)

_(Secrets are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json)_

openhands.secrets.customSecret2.markdownDescription:
**To set your custom secret 2 securely:**

[🔑 Configure Custom Secret 2](command:openhands.setCustomSecret2)

_(Secrets are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json)_

openhands.secrets.customSecret3.markdownDescription:
**To set your custom secret 3 securely:**

[🔑 Configure Custom Secret 3](command:openhands.setCustomSecret3)

_(Secrets are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json)_

scripts.build: npm run build -w @openhands/agent-sdk-ts && npm run compile
scripts.compile: tsc -p . && npm run build:tailwind && npm run build:webview
scripts.e2e: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('tests/e2e/out', { recursive: true, force: true })" && npm run compile && tsc -p tests/e2e/tsconfig.suite.json && tsc -p tsconfig.e2e.json && mocha tests/e2e/out/**/*.test.js
scripts.e2e:agent-server: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('tests/e2e/out', { recursive: true, force: true })" && npm run compile && tsc -p tests/e2e/tsconfig.suite.json && tsc -p tsconfig.e2e.json && mocha tests/e2e/out/agentServerRemote.test.js
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @openhands/agent-sdk-ts && eslint src tests
